top_signals.title: Zuckerberg's Meta layoffs memo: 'Success isn't a given' in the AI era
top_signals.summary: Meta on Wednesday commenced its latest round of layoffs affecting about 10% of the company's workforce, equating to roughly 8,000 jobs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
